title: Eli and the Clear Umbrella Sky

beats.storyText: Eli zipped his yellow slicker, opened his tiny clear umbrella, and counted the puddles waiting on the sidewalk.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli stands on a rainy sidewalk in a yellow slicker and tall rain boots, holding a tiny clear umbrella, with friendly puddles reflecting soft clouds.

beats.storyText: Inside the puddle reflection, a little cloud seemed folded up like a handkerchief and whispered for a path home.
beats.pageTurnHook: Eli lifted one boot, then hesitated.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli bends toward a small glowing puddle reflection where a tiny soft cloud shape appears, curious and gentle in the rain.

beats.storyText: He whispered, Step light, splash bright, but one too-big jump might scatter the cloud into a hundred silver dots.
beats.pageTurnHook: Then another raindrop pointed to the next puddle.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli balances carefully with one boot raised, umbrella tilted, watching raindrops make a dotted trail across the sidewalk.

beats.storyText: Eli made a chain of gentle splashes, and each puddle lent the cloud one more piece of blue until the sidewalk looked like sky.
beats.pageTurnHook: But the last puddle was under a rushing gutter.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli steps lightly from puddle to puddle, each splash glowing blue in transparent watercolor, the sidewalk becoming a playful reflected sky.

beats.storyText: The gutter gurgled, his umbrella bobbled, and the little cloud blurred until Eli could hardly tell water from worry.
beats.pageTurnHook: He needed a bigger kind of careful.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli crouches beside a busy gutter, holding the tiny clear umbrella close, worried but safe as rain ripples around his yellow boots.

beats.storyText: Eli called, Step together, shine bright, and his neighbors tiptoed a quiet splash bridge that carried the cloud past the gutter.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli and friendly neighbors make a careful line of tiny splashes over puddles, helping the reflected cloud glow open into a bright patch of sky.

beats.storyText: When the rain softened, Eli closed his clear umbrella and found one pocket-sized patch of blue shining in every puddle.
beats.illustrationBrief: Eli smiles on the calm sidewalk after rain, clear umbrella folded, yellow boots beside puddles that reflect peaceful blue sky.
